overview: This lichen appears to be Lobarina scrobiculata, also known as textured lungwort. It is a large, foliose (leafy) lichen that grows on the bark of trees and rocks in moist, shaded environments. The species partners with cyanobacteria to fix nitrogen from the air and is considered a cyanolichen. It is sensitive to air pollution and typically inhabits old-growth forests or mature woodlands.
